I walked in expecting to dominate a conversation. The store was empty. I found a couch, ran through my leverage, and waited.
The vendor walked out. Adrenaline surged. I shot up, shook his hand perhaps a little too firmly, and laid out my needs — 500 badges, three designs.

title: I can do 2 dollars per badge for this amount.
That's a bit higher than my budget. Could you do 1 dollar per badge?
No. For this quantity my margins are too low. If you needed 1000, I could consider it.
My college holds up to twelve camps a year. Come to a good deal today, and I'll be back.
I still can't do 1 dollar with no promise of future deals.
I could bring it down to 1.75.
body: For 500 badges that's 875 dollars. Can we do 1.50?
